# stalwart_account (Data Source)

Reads a Stalwart account (user or group) by its email address.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "stalwart_account" "alice" {
  email = "alice@example.com"
}

output "alice_quota" {
  value = data.stalwart_account.alice.quota
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `email` (String) Email address of the account to look up, e.g. `alice@example.com`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp of the account.
- `description` (String) Description of the account.
- `domain_id` (String) Id of the domain the account belongs to.
- `email_address` (String) Full email address of the account.
- `id` (String) Opaque server-assigned identifier of the account.
- `member_of` (List of String) Ids of groups this account is a member of.
- `name` (String) Account name (the local part of the email address).
- `quota` (Number) Maximum disk space allocated, in bytes (the `maxDiskQuota` storage quota).
- `type` (String) Account type: `User` or `Group`.
- `used_disk_quota` (Number) Disk space currently used, in bytes.
